pages.text: We are going on a trip. I ask Mama what to pack. She says, ‘The things that really matter.’

blocks.text: We are going on a trip. I ask Mama what to pack.
She says, ‘The things that really matter.’

pages.text: We stop at the windmill for breakfast, The jungle gym is so much fun. I forget my toy.

blocks.text: We stop at the windmill for breakfast, The jungle gym is so much fun.
I forget my toy.

pages.text: I am sad in the car, but Tando is happy. ‘Hooray! Now you can play with me !’ he says.

blocks.text: I am sad in the car, but Tando is happy.
‘Hooray! Now you can play with me !’ he says.

pages.text: We stop at a farm to see some animals. Tando is searching so hard for a springbok, a monkey gets away with his headphones.

blocks.text: We stop at a farm to see some animals. Tando is searching so hard for a springbok,
a monkey gets away with his headphones.

pages.text: He is sad in the car, but I am happy. ‘Hooray! Now you can sing with me !’ I say.

blocks.text: He is sad in the car, but I am happy.
‘Hooray! Now you can sing with me !’ I say.

pages.text: We stop at a roaring waterfall. We are so excited, we are pushing and pulling. Papa falls in the water, and so does his map.

blocks.text: We stop at a roaring waterfall. We are so excited, we are pushing and pulling.
Papa falls in the water, and so does his map.

pages.text: He is sad in the car, but Mama is happy. ‘Hooray! Now I can help you find our way!’ she says.

blocks.text: He is sad in the car, but Mama is happy.
‘Hooray! Now I can help you find our way!’ she says.

pages.text: We stop at the roadside vendor to buy some mielies. Mama bends over to pick the best ones, and her glasses fall and break.

blocks.text: We stop at the roadside vendor to buy some mielies.
Mama bends over to pick the best ones, and her glasses fall and break.

pages.text: Mama is sad in the car, but Papa is happy. ‘Hooray! Now we can find our way together !’ Papa says.

blocks.text: Mama is sad in the car, but Papa is happy.
‘Hooray! Now we can find our way together !’ Papa says.

pages.text: We stop on an ancient hill to get a view of the valley. Papa is making silly jokes for us to smile for the picture, but...

blocks.text: We stop on an ancient hill to get a view of the valley. Papa is making silly jokes for us to smile for the picture,
but...

pages.text: when we get back to the car, it won’t start. Everyone stops laughing. ‘Don’t worry...’ says Mama. ‘WeWe can are still the have things a good that time. really matter.’

blocks.text: when we get back to the car, it won’t start.
Everyone stops laughing.
‘Don’t worry...’ says Mama. ‘WeWe can are still the have things a good that time. really matter.’

pages.text: And so, we do have a good time. By playing and singing and finding our way together, while enjoying the best mielies.

blocks.text: And so, we do have a good time.
By playing and singing and finding our way together,
while enjoying the best mielies.
